title: House Robber III
hints: Consider the choice at each node: rob it or skip it. How does that choice affect the immediate children?
Use post-order traversal to return two values for each subtree: max loot if the root is robbed, and max if it is skipped.
If you rob the current node, you must skip its children. If you skip, you can take the best of robbing or skipping each child.
